EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} put out of maintenance objects "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started resource information collection from objects "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} put to maintenance objects "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped resource information collection from objects "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
